goal: Close EN/TH parity gap on meanings index — TH was missing all 5 category count badges + JS formatter was English-only
done: (1) js/meanings.js formatCategoryCount now returns 'X ใบ' when state.currentLang==='th' else 'X card(s)'. (2) th/tarot-card-meanings/index.html gained 5 <span class="count-badge" data-category-count> elements: major (inline near the 22-ใบ prose in major-arcana-feature), wands/cups/swords/pentacles (added alongside the existing minor-cta spans, not replacing them)
symptom: TH users on /th/tarot-card-meanings/ saw no card counts; even if HTML had badges, JS would have overwritten the Thai static text with English ('22 cards') on first locale render
root_cause: Two layers: (a) th/tarot-card-meanings/index.html shipped without data-category-count spans so renderCategoryCounts() silently no-op'd via the !el guard; (b) formatCategoryCount hardcoded English templating
fix: Added locale branch to formatCategoryCount using existing state.currentLang; added 5 spans to TH markup with Thai static fallback text matching post-JS render output ('14 ใบ' / '22 ใบ')
notes: Surgeon-rule: touched only js/meanings.js + th/tarot-card-meanings/index.html. EN meanings.html unchanged (already had the badges + correct English fallback). The redirect-stub th/meanings.html (28-line bouncer to /th/tarot-card-meanings/) was intentionally not touched. www/ + ios/ mirrors deferred to cp + cap sync workflow.
